name: Quick Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cooked beef into 2 to 2 1/2 cups of bite-sized pieces.
2. Peel and cut the carrots into 2 1/2-inch strips.
3. Peel and cut the potatoes into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
4. In a 2 1/2 quart casserole, combine all ingredients.
5. Cover and microwave on high until boiling, for 10 to 12 minutes.
6. Stir the mixture, then cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
7. Continue microwaving until the vegetables are tender, stirring every 5 minutes for an additional 10 to 12 minutes.
